description_long: This is a small, round bread roll with a domed top and a slightly irregular, rustic shape. The crust is a deep golden brown with some darker, almost charred spots, suggesting it was baked at a high temperature. The lower portion of the bread transitions to a lighter, beige color, indicating a softer, less-cooked underside. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with no visible seeds, flour dusting, or scoring marks. The bread appears unsliced and whole, with a dense, compact form typical of a dinner roll or bun. There are no visible labels, packaging, or branding on the bread.
description: A small, round, rustic bread roll with a deep golden-brown crust and a lighter, soft underside. The surface is matte and unsliced, with a slightly rough texture.
description_view_0: The bread roll is seen from a slightly elevated angle, showing the domed top with a rich, dark brown crust and a lighter base.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the bread, emphasizing the transition from the dark, baked top to the lighter, softer bottom edge.
description_view_2: The bread appears more oval from this angle, with the dark crust dominating the visible surface and minimal lighter areas.
description_view_3: The front view shows a balanced gradient from the deep brown top to the pale bottom, with the roll's roundness clearly visible.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is smooth and unscored, with a natural, uneven browning and some darker, almost burnt spots. There are no seeds, flour dusting, or decorative markings visible.
